title: Literacy Skills Word Explorer
description: This challenging word search focuses on commonly confused words and important literacy concepts. Students will search for words related to homophones, prefixes, and vocabulary building while reinforcing their understanding of these terms.
instructions: Find all the hidden words in the grid. Words can be placed horizontally, vertically, diagonally, forwards, or backwards. Circle each word when you find it and check it off the list. Challenge: After finding all words, write a sentence using each one correctly.

clues: A large mammal with a trunk
Something that doesn't follow the rule
To ask someone to come to an event
A written or verbal request to attend something
A place where people work at desks
A person who works in law enforcement
Relating to an office or position of authority
